question.label: Heavier than sounded
question.name: When you say 'heavier' — what was adding the weight?
question.description: Drills into the specific source of the load Lin just named.

answer: Late nights came from carrying decision bottlenecks and final reviews.

assessment.note: He is carrying decision bottlenecks and final reviews himself, which signals heavy ownership load and strained engagement; also reveals a wellbeing/delegation issue worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Decision bottlenecks
new_queue.name: Where are those decision bottlenecks actually sitting?

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Hand-off friction
new_queue.name: What makes it hard to hand more of this off?

new_queue.label: Load relief
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks lighter for you?

history.answer_excerpt: The last stretch shipped, but it was heavier than I made it sound.
Late nights came from carrying decision bottlenecks and final reviews.
The last stretch shipped, but it was heavier than I made it sound.
